pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x is incompatible with Java 21; the application will fail to compile or run due to removed APIs and bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler will reject Java 21 syntax or fail to target the correct bytecode version if the property remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to support modern Java and security standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: HttpClient 4.x may have compatibility issues or lack support in newer Spring Boot versions; HttpClient 5 is the current standard.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.general_idea: Replace deprecated Integer constructor with Integer.valueOf to comply with Java 21 standards.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.why_exists: The Integer(int) constructor is deprecated since Java 9 and may be removed in future releases; using it can cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.general_idea: Add import for the new @Serial annotation introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 8, causing a compilation error if used without the import in Java 21.

Class.newInstance() is deprecated for removal in Java 17+ and throws InstantiationException instead of InvocationTargetException, breaking error handling patterns and causing compilation warnings/errors in strict Java 21 environments.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) equivalents.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: Apache HttpClient 4.x classes are removed or incompatible in the new dependency version; code fails to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Update variable type from HttpRequestBase to HttpUriRequestBase to match HC5 API.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: HttpRequestBase class is removed in HC5; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Replace direct instantiation of DefaultHttpClient with HttpClients.createDefault() factory method.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: DefaultHttpClient class is removed in HC5; code fails to compile.

src/test/java/com/marklogic/MLEAProxyTes.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations and runner to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) API.
src/test/java/com/marklogic/MLEAProxyTes.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 test engines, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute in a JUnit 5 environment.
